_comment: Tier-2 output-parity gate allowlist. Each entry is a KNOWN, triaged DIFFERS scenario the gate tolerates. Under PARITY_STRICT=1 the harness fails on any DIFFERS NOT listed here (new drift, or a regression of a fixed bug). To retire an entry: fix the Studio reimplementation so it MATCHES, then delete the line. See Scripts/CLI-PARITY-TIER2-PLAN.md §7 (findings F4–F11).

allow.none__dicom-compress-backends: F4: host-dependent hardware-backend list (excluded from committed set; local-only DIFFERS).
allow.none__dicom-uid-lookup-listall: F5 (minor): UID list matches; Studio appends a `N UIDs found` footer.
allow.syn-studyset__dicom-study-summary-json: F9 (minor): same data, series array order differs (Studio asc, CLI desc).
allow.syn-studyset__dicom-study-check: F10 (minor): Studio prints `[OK] Study is complete`; CLI is silent on stdout.
allow.syn-studyset__dicom-study-check-expected: F10 (minor): as above (check with expected counts).
allow.syn-studyset__dicom-study-compare: F10 (minor): Studio uses `[OK]` where the CLI uses `✓`.
allow.syn-studyset__dicom-merge-studyset: F14 (minor): merging a mixed-series directory, Studio inherits SeriesNumber from a different source frame than the CLI (1 vs 2). Local-only (fresh SOP UID).
